name: Match Factory!
methodology: Open web HTML fetch from the preselected low-login-risk sources. For each source, extract event-related headings, paragraphs, links, and image URLs; follow a small number of event-like links for detail pages.

sources.page_title: What is Merge? — Match Factory Help Center
sources.meta_description: Merge is a time-limited event with different themes where you can earn rewards by merging items. It becomes available after reaching Level 90.
relevant_text_blocks: Merge is a time-limited event with different themes where you can earn rewards by merging items. It becomes available after reaching Level 90. Tap the Energy button to generate a random item on the board. Drag identical items together to merge them into a higher-level item. Continue merging to unlock various items in the collection and earn great rewards. The event ends once you have collected all items and rewards.

This website uses only the necessary cookies required for the site's proper functioning. By using the website, you consent to all cookies in accordance with the cookie policy. To know more, refer Cookie Policy. Match Factory Support Home
